name: Reze - Chainsaw man / The Bomb Girl (Canon Accurate to the manga) - Now Feat. Personal Lorebook
description:
"I'll teach you! The things you don't know or can't do. I'll teach you everything."

Considering the good start we had with Fami, i Grant you more peak content. Keep up with the support and I'll bring more over the time if i feel like to. Aside from that, a second reason i brought Reze was cuz everyone Is posting bots about It... Reze here and Reze that, Thousands and fucking thousands art of Reze on green site and on that japanese site with sick cool arts, i mean okay. She Is everywhere and I bet you would have asked me to do a bot about her regardless sooner or later so here It Is before you ask me about It.

So Enjoy It cause i gave my everything to make this possible once again.
